rationale: CRITICAL COHERENCE ISSUE: Cycle 8 only pushed status files but NOT the actual code changes. encounter_card_overlay.gd and screen_dither_layer.gd were never modified on main. This cycle: (1) applied the missing minigame.start() fix, (2) added 90s timeout on minigame await to prevent hangs, (3) fixed set_color_levels PSX routing + := style violation, (4) implemented typewriter text, staggered button animations, and field hint label for the encounter card overlay.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 9 (encounter_card_overlay.gd v2). Then: Rune activation UI during card encounters (bible: activation avant choix, 1 Ogham/carte max).
